title: Provisions retroactive
doc_html:
§622. Provisions retroactive

            The provisions of R.S. 39:619 through 621 shall extend to any plan proposed in any petition heretofore filed in any court of bankruptcy in the United States.
doc_text:
§622.  Provisions retroactive
The provisions of R.S. 39:619 through 621 shall extend to any plan proposed
in any petition heretofore filed in any court of bankruptcy in the United States.
